reasoning: 386 hanabi festival records returned, covering the intent well. However most items lack prefecture, dates, and English descriptions — an agent cannot directly advise a traveler without extensive follow-up. The data volume is strong but the enrichment per item is thin.
missing_data: Dates (month/year of event), English name translations, venue/prefecture for majority of items, crowd size context
improvement_hint: Add event_month and prefecture_code fields to hanabi items; surface top 5-10 with richest metadata first rather than dumping 386 sparse records.

reasoning: Identical corpus to L3-01 with lang=ja. Same strengths and weaknesses: 386 records but most lack prefecture and dates. Japanese-language query served correctly, but practical utility remains limited without enrichment.
missing_data: Event dates, prefecture for most records, Japanese descriptions for many items
improvement_hint: Same as L3-01: surface enriched top items first; add prefecture/month to hanabi corpus.

reasoning: Query is about snow festivals in Hokkaido; the tool returns 0 festival items for Hokkaido and falls back to national UNESCO ICH items from unrelated prefectures (Akita, Saitama, Mie, etc.). Sapporo Snow Festival and Sounkyo Ice Festival are absent. Critical retrieval failure.
missing_data: Sapporo Snow Festival, Sounkyo Ice Festival, Asahikawa Winter Festival — core snow festival data for Hokkaido
improvement_hint: Add yukimatsuri / snow_festival kind_tag to the festivals corpus; ensure Hokkaido snow festival records are scraped and indexed.

reasoning: Query is about rural life experience (田舎暮らし体験) in Chinese. Tool returns Japan Heritage canonical items dominated by castles, teahouses, archaeological sites — none specifically about rural/satoyama living experience. The tool choice is also a mismatch: get_japan_heritage covers 文化庁 narratives, not experiential rural stays.
missing_data: Satoyama experiences, rural homestay programs,農泊 (agri-tourism stay) options, kominka guesthouses
improvement_hint: Add an agri_tourism or rural_experience kind; get_local_specialty or search_area with 農泊/satoyama would better serve this intent.

reasoning: 140 results returned for 紅葉 in Korean. Top results include legitimate autumn foliage spots (Kenroku-en, Matsumae Castle, Himeji Castle). However first result is a civil engineering facility (erosion control work) — irrelevant hit inflating rank. No Korean-language names surfaced despite lang=ko.
missing_data: Korean name translations for top spots, best-viewing month/peak season data
improvement_hint: Filter out pure-infrastructure results (erosion_control, civil_engineering) from tourism queries; populate Korean name field for high-prominence spots.

reasoning: Query seeks quiet meditation temples, not touristy ones. Tool returns 修行-related results including legitimate spots (Rinzai-ji shugyo experience, Koya-san adjacent) but also a ninja experience and Suginami-ku urban temple. The 'not touristy' constraint is not addressed — no crowd_band filtering applied.
missing_data: Crowd_band=low temples with zazen/shukubo programs, explicit meditation retreat information
improvement_hint: Add shukubo and zazen kind_tags; use crowd_band filter to surface low-crowd meditation venues; ninja experience is off-intent.

reasoning: Aurora borealis is not visible in Japan under normal conditions (Japan is too far south). Query is scientifically problematic. The tool returns observatories, national parks, and a ropeway via kinds_class_match — loosely related to dark skies but not aurora. No safety note about impossibility of aurora viewing.
missing_data: Factual note that auroras are not visible in Japan; dark sky sites are tangentially useful but should be contextualized
wrong_data: Implicitly suggests aurora viewing is feasible in Japan by returning results without disclaimer
improvement_hint: Add a safety/factual note when query intent is scientifically impossible in Japan; return dark_sky sites as alternatives with clear framing.

reasoning: Query is specifically about sleeping in a 100-year-old house (古民家). Tool returns Gifu hotels: onsen ryokan (日本秘湯を守る会 members) and generic OSM hostels/apartments. No kominka guesthouses are surfaced. The intent constraint (historical building accommodation) is not addressed.
missing_data: Kominka guesthouses in Gifu (Shirakawa-go, Hida area), machiya stays, heritage building lodging
improvement_hint: Add kominka and machiya_stay kind_tags to hotel corpus; filter/boost lodging_type=kominka when historical-building intent is detected.

reasoning: Thai query asks for non-touristy cherry blossom spots (穴場). Tool returns 215 results for 桜 including Kenroku-en, Himeji Castle, Matsumae Castle — all famous, crowded sites. The 'not touristy/hidden' constraint is completely unaddressed. crowd_band=low items exist in corpus but aren't prioritized.
missing_data: Low-crowd cherry blossom spots, local sakura meisho with crowd_band=low, regional lesser-known sites
improvement_hint: When query contains 穴場/hidden/non-touristy signal, boost crowd_band=low results to top; Thai response lacks Thai name translations.

reasoning: Photography/dramatic landscape query returns 絶景-tagged content including legitimate scenic routes (Ehime, Niigata). Match count 53 is modest but relevant. DMO content and scrape spots provide some usable detail. Lacks structured coordinates and specific photography conditions.
missing_data: Coordinates for most scrape spots, best season/time-of-day for photography, specific named viewpoints
improvement_hint: Add geo-tagged scenic viewpoint entities; include seasonal peak info in spot descriptions for photography-oriented queries.

reasoning: Arabic query for outdoor hot springs returns 72 露天風呂 results with good detail. Top results (宝泉坊温泉, 祓川温泉, 小薮温泉) are legitimate outdoor onsen spots with descriptive Japanese text. The 'not in hotels' constraint is partially met — some are standalone facilities. Arabic translations absent.
missing_data: Arabic name/description translations, explicit 'outdoor / wild / konyoku' filter, seasonal access notes
improvement_hint: Add Arabic translations for high-traffic onsen terms; surface konyoku/outdoor-specific kind_tag results first.

reasoning: Query is about swimming with wild dolphins in Japan (Mikurajima/Tatsunoshima). Top result is a completely irrelevant Kyoto cultural ambassador page. Second result is an aquarium (captive dolphins). No wild dolphin swimming locations returned. Severe retrieval failure for this niche wildlife experience.
missing_data: Mikurajima dolphin swimming, Tatsunoshima/Nagasaki wild dolphin spots, specific dive/snorkel operators
improvement_hint: Add dolphin_watching and marine_wildlife kind_tags; index Mikurajima and Tatsunoshima as dolphin_swimming destinations.

reasoning: Query about traditional architecture (重伝建地区). get_japan_heritage returns 104 Japanese Heritage narratives but the canonical items shown are teahouse, castle, Jomon site, fishing village — not streetscape preservation districts (重伝建). The tool note even admits UNESCO WHS / specific landmarks need different tools.
missing_data: 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 (重伝建) districts like Kyoto Higashiyama, Kanazawa Higashi Chaya, Tsumago
improvement_hint: Add preservation_district and judenken kind_tag; route traditional-architecture queries to search_area with judenken filter.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about Ainu culture in Hokkaido. Excellent result: returns Ainu Museum (Porotokotan/Upopoy), National Ainu Museum, Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Hokkaido Ainu Center, Kawamura Kaneto Museum — all Hokkaido, all directly relevant. Coordinates and websites present.
missing_data: Vietnamese name translations, experiential program info (craft workshops, ceremonies)
improvement_hint: Add Vietnamese translations to Ainu museum records; enrich with experience/workshop availability field.

reasoning: Query about cliff-carved Buddhist statues (磨崖仏). Returns 73 results with excellent top hits: Usuki Stone Buddhas (National Treasure, Special Historic Site), Oya-dera (Special Historic Site), Komasaka Magaibutsu, Kiyomizu Magaibutsu. Heritage designations are accurate and comprehensive.
missing_data: Visiting hours, admission fees, access directions for top sites
improvement_hint: Add opening_hours and access info to magaibutsu records; these are often remote sites needing transport guidance.

reasoning: Query specifies day trips from Tokyo to volcanos. Tool returns 88 results including Mt. Iwate (Iwate), Mt. Unzen (Nagasaki), Lake Towada (Aomori) — all impossible as Tokyo day trips. Mt. Fuji is present but buried. The 'day trip from Tokyo' constraint is completely unhandled — no proximity filtering applied.
missing_data: Proximity/travel-time filter from Tokyo; Izu Oshima, Hakone, Fuji as day-trip volcanos prominently surfaced
improvement_hint: Add travel_time_from_tokyo metadata; boost results within 2-3h of Tokyo when day-trip intent detected; filter out Kyushu/Tohoku volcanos.

reasoning: Indonesian query about eating freshly-made tofu at a temple. Tool returns MAFF GI products (frozen tofu, Ikijima tofu) and food producers — relevant to tofu but not to the temple experience constraint. No temple tofu cuisine (shojin ryori) or temple-adjacent tofu restaurants surfaced.
missing_data: Shojin ryori temple restaurants, Nanzenji tofu district in Kyoto, Koya-san tofu experiences
improvement_hint: Add shojin_ryori kind_tag; when query combines temple + food, route to get_traditional_arts or search_area with temple + food combined.

reasoning: Query about time-frozen fishing villages. Returns 86 results: top hit is a sakura-ebi dining guide, second is an active commercial fishing port (Itoman), third is a market alley. These are active modern ports, not preserved historical fishing villages. Tomo-no-ura, Ine no Funaya are absent.
missing_data: Ine no Funaya (Kyoto), Tomo-no-ura (Hiroshima), Dejima/historic port districts — preserved fishing villages
improvement_hint: Add fishing_village_preserved kind_tag distinct from active 漁港; scrape/index Ine and Tomo-no-ura as heritage fishing villages.

reasoning: Query specifically about washi (traditional paper making) from a master. Tool returns 231 METI craft items starting with Ainu textiles, silk tsumugi — not washi. Washi records likely exist in the corpus (Echizen, Mino, Ogawa washi are METI-designated) but are buried far below irrelevant textile items.
missing_data: Washi (越前和紙, 美濃和紙, 小川和紙, 西ノ内和紙) records prominently surfaced; papermaking workshop locations
improvement_hint: Add keyword/category filter for washi within get_local_specialty; sort by relevance to query when q parameter is absent but intent is clear.

reasoning: Query about period-drama-like scenery. 宿場 search returns 104 results with excellent top hits: Tsumago-juku, Narai-juku, Seki-juku (all Important Preservation Districts). DMO content adds narrative depth. Coordinates and heritage designations present. Good match count and quality.
missing_data: Access info (nearest station), walking distance, best season
improvement_hint: Add nearest_station field to shukuba records; include recommended walking route length.

reasoning: Query asks for uncrowded beaches. Returns 115 results including Naminoue Beach (Naha city — very accessible/busy), Tropical Beach, and other Okinawa beaches. crowd_band=low entries exist but not prioritized. The 'not crowded' constraint is not applied in ranking. Multiple hakusha_seishou_100 (white sand/blue sea) spots are good candidates but not surfaced first.
missing_data: Crowd_band=low beaches with low prominence scores; Tohoku/Hokuriku/San-in coast lesser-known beaches
improvement_hint: Apply crowd_band=low filter when 'uncrowded/not busy' intent detected; boost low-prominence_score beaches for hidden gem queries.

reasoning: Query about local izakaya yokocho. Returns 74 results but first hit is a small park in Shinagawa, second is a Chinese-language tourism overview page for Saga. Legitimate yokocho results (はいからっと横丁, 御徒町らーめん横丁) appear lower. Famous yokocho like Yurakucho, Omoide Yokocho, Ameya Yokocho absent.

reasoning: German query about rural train travel. Returns 74 results including Sagano Scenic Line, Oigawa Railway, local Nagano lines with narrative content. Relevant local_railway kind_tag results present. DMO content adds scenic context. Lacks German translations and schedule/booking info.
missing_data: German name translations, train schedules/booking links, best season for scenic views from trains
improvement_hint: Add German translations to railway attraction records; include timetable_url field for scenic railway lines.

reasoning: Firefly viewing query returns 73 results. Top hits include ホタルイカ群遊海面 (squid, not fireflies — misleading top rank), ホタルの里 park, Toyoda Hotaru Museum, and Kitakyushu firefly area. The squid bioluminescence site at rank 1 is a retrieval noise issue but overall coverage is adequate.
missing_data: Best viewing months (June), specific riverside sites, Kochi/Nagasaki famous hotaru spots
wrong_data: ホタルイカ群遊海面 is firefly squid, not fireflies — potentially confusing lead result
improvement_hint: Distinguish ホタルイカ (firefly squid) from ホタル (firefly) in kind_tags; add best_season field to wildlife viewing records.

reasoning: Russian query about wintering cranes. Returns 216 results. Top relevant hit: 出水ツル渡来地 (Izumi crane migration grounds, Kagoshima) with Special Natural Monument, Ramsar Wetland designations, coordinates and English description. Kushiro wetlands (Hokkaido) also present. Two key sites well represented.
missing_data: Best viewing months (October-March), access from nearest city, visitor center info, Russian translations
improvement_hint: Add Russian translations for top wildlife sites; include wintering_season date range in crane_wintering kind metadata.
